accepted.reason: Cookie parsing and constant-time comparison loops are compact, reusable utility kernels.
Nested-list subtree indexing via deque traversal is a clear standalone algorithmic kernel.
Constraint-based string scanning over lines is deterministic and conversion-friendly.
Sparse and dense trace accumulation loops are concise numerical primitives.

skipped.reason: Game-piece move generation is domain-specific object logic rather than general optimization kernel content.
Array/broadcast-style helper functions depend on broader grid model assumptions and are less self-contained.
Cython semantics regression test; not a target compute kernel.
Polymorphic integration kernel already represented in current unpaired set.
Minimal data-container class with little optimization signal.
Binding/helper layer for external C++ APIs, not suitable as standalone Cython kernel training data.
